title: The Hollow Swords!
description: This set of resources changes the texture of the all swords on the character and in their inventory to the model of the Nail from "Hollow Knight".
body:
Welcome to "The Hollow Sword!" pack! This set of resources changes the texture of the all swords on the character and in their inventory to the model of the Nail from "Hollow Knight". Well, that's about it.


![gg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22811b1718edef7289909a8453c42d5529850fe8_0.webp)
